{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323191718D401C1D537267A55C59C\"}"},"total":29},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7540856417765917502","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"内容确实丰富，宋朝的经济，政治，文化都一一展现出来，历史人物也相应依序登场进了每个人的义务，完成了相应的历史任务！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755749376,"group_id":"7345722448794356798","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"迷乱书海破识后，一切只是性命修。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5Gcn5710rt6ufzS2/94hfgvtlMtaRthh6Iknle84MTv","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3548863104292071","user_name":"书海精灵"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3548863104292071","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7345722448794356798","book_info":{"abstract":"提起宋朝，不少人的的第一人印象是“积贫积弱”，然而宋朝却是中国古代历史上商品经济、文化教育、科学创新高度繁荣的时代，宋朝民间的富庶与社会经济的繁荣实远超过盛唐。本书从赵匡胤建立宋朝开始，到1276年元朝攻占临安，崖山海战后，南宋灭亡止，按时间顺序细读宋朝的政治、军事、文化等各个方面，通过分析宋朝的对内对外政策、两宋人物的心理风貌、几次重大的改革、文人与武人在宋朝的地位、面对内部起义和外部势力时的决策，为读者展现一个显微镜下的大宋。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/655aba91f702a368564a7e1635e2baeb~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"刘路","author_id":"","book_id":"7345722448794356798","book_name":"细读两宋三百年","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#504028","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"7.9万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":402,\"name\":\"中国历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=402\u0026name=中国历史\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7528312453017390105","read_count":"1615","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"290844"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"6","tags":"历史,中国历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/655aba91f702a368564a7e1635e2baeb~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779448638\u0026x-signature=Fdup0AeC2uzgE5UUks8UJGl36%2Bg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"64"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323191718D401C1D537267A55C59C\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读22小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":47877,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":78581,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":930},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7412115398085133066","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书很有意思啊！它让我了解到宋朝并不像人们想象的那样弱小，实际上它在很多方面都非常繁荣。就像我叔叔，他是个历史老师，经常跟我讲宋朝的文化有多厉害。而且我发现，书里说的文武关系就像我和我朋友，他喜欢运动，我喜欢看书，虽然我们爱好不同，但也能互相理解和帮助。这本书让我对宋朝有了更深刻的认识，推荐你也看看！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1725407771,"group_id":"7345722448794356798","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人傻一点，糊涂一点，欢乐就不止多一点点！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+54ABe+o2K0TruDcse35OxQBz6bIsV+UiSsvBnee4+u","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f2388e1c4f9942679d54de2fb830c07c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776795171\u0026x-signature=sQboQaPK2N%2BMFFA%2BPYoWWAyBcGo%3D","user_id":"3070303835526286","user_name":"残箫_"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3070303835526286","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7345722448794356798","book_info":{"abstract":"提起宋朝，不少人的的第一人印象是“积贫积弱”，然而宋朝却是中国古代历史上商品经济、文化教育、科学创新高度繁荣的时代，宋朝民间的富庶与社会经济的繁荣实远超过盛唐。本书从赵匡胤建立宋朝开始，到1276年元朝攻占临安，崖山海战后，南宋灭亡止，按时间顺序细读宋朝的政治、军事、文化等各个方面，通过分析宋朝的对内对外政策、两宋人物的心理风貌、几次重大的改革、文人与武人在宋朝的地位、面对内部起义和外部势力时的决策，为读者展现一个显微镜下的大宋。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/655aba91f702a368564a7e1635e2baeb~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"刘路","author_id":"","book_id":"7345722448794356798","book_name":"细读两宋三百年","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#504028","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"7.9万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":402,\"name\":\"中国历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=402\u0026name=中国历史\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7528312453017390105","read_count":"1615","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"290844"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"6","tags":"历史,中国历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/655aba91f702a368564a7e1635e2baeb~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779448638\u0026x-signature=Fdup0AeC2uzgE5UUks8UJGl36%2Bg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260
